zh.lifeSummary: 當Gertrud von Ballenstedt於大約1150年出生在德國安哈爾特藍德可萊斯 巴倫斯泰特時，她的父親Graf Adalbert von Aschersleben "von Ballensted"17歲，母親Adelheid von Wettin12歲。她於1194年之前與Graf Walther von Arnstein結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1194年之後。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gertrud von Ballenstedt于大约1150年出生在德国安哈爾特藍德可萊斯 巴倫斯泰特时，她的父亲Graf Adalbert von Aschersleben "von Ballensted"17岁，母亲Adelheid von Wettin12岁。她于1194年之前与Graf Walther von Arnstein结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1194年之后。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Gertrud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from gēr, gār ‘spear’ + þrūþ ‘strength’; the name of two famous 13th-century nuns of the Cistercian Abbey of Helfta near Eisleben, whose spiritual writings had a great influence.

variants.name: Gertraud
meanings: from gēr, gār ‘spear’ + þrūþ ‘strength’; the name of two famous 13th-century nuns of the Cistercian Abbey of Helfta near Eisleben, whose spiritual writings had a great influence.

variants.name: Gertraut
meanings: from gēr, gār ‘spear’ + þrūþ ‘strength’; the name of two famous 13th-century nuns of the Cistercian Abbey of Helfta near Eisleben, whose spiritual writings had a great influence.

en.lifeSummary: When Gertrud von Ballenstedt was born about 1150, in Ballenstedt, Anhalt, Germany, her father, Graf Adalbert von Aschersleben "von Ballensted", was 17 and her mother, Adelheid von Wettin, was 12. She married Graf Walther von Arnstein before 1194. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 2 daughters. She died after 1194.

fr.Arnstein, Mansteld-Sudharz, Saxony-Anhal: Arnstein, Harkerode, Mansfelder Land, Sachsen-Anhalt, Allemagne
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gertrud von Ballenstedt est née environ 1150, à Landkreis Ballenstedt, Anhalt, Allemagne, son père, Graf Adalbert von Aschersleben "von Ballensted", avait 17 ans et sa mère, Adelheid von Wettin, avait 12 ans. Elle a épousé Graf Walther von Arnstein avant 1194. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée après 1194.

de.Arnstein, Mansteld-Sudharz, Saxony-Anhal: Arnstein, Harkerode, Mansfelder Land, Sachsen-Anhalt, Deutschland
de.lifeSummary: Als Gertrud von Ballenstedt um 1150 in Landkreis Ballenstedt, Anhalt, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Graf Adalbert von Aschersleben "von Ballensted" 17 und ihre Mutter Adelheid von Wettin 12. Sie hat vor 1194 Graf Walther von Arnstein geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb nach 1194.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gertrud von Ballenstedt è nata il circa 1150 nel Landkreis Ballenstedt, Anhalt, Germania, sua padre, Graf Adalbert von Aschersleben "von Ballensted", aveva 17 anni e sua madre, Adelheid von Wettin, aveva 12 anni. Lei sposato Graf Walther von Arnstein prima del 1194. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 2 figlie. Morì dopo il 1194.

ja.lifeSummary: Gertrud von Ballenstedtが約1150年にドイツアンハルトランドクレイス ボーレンステトで生まれた時，父Graf Adalbert von Aschersleben "von Ballensted"は17歳，母Adelheid von Wettinは12歳であった。1194年以前にGraf Walther von Arnsteinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1194年以後に死去した。

ko.Arnstein, Mansteld-Sudharz, Saxony-Anhal: 독일 작센-아할트 맨스펠더 랜드 하르케로드 아른스타인
ko.lifeSummary: Gertrud von Ballenstedt(이)가 대략 1150년 독일 아할트 랜드크레이스 바렌스테드트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Graf Adalbert von Aschersleben "von Ballensted"(은)는 17세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adelheid von Wettin(은)는 12세였다. 그녀는 1194년 이전 Graf Walther von Arnstein(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1194년 이후 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gertrud von Ballenstedt nasceu aproximadamente 1150, em Landkreis Ballenstedt, Anhalt, Alemanha, seu pai, Graf Adalbert von Aschersleben "von Ballensted", tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Adelheid von Wettin, tinha 12 anos. Ela casou-se com Graf Walther von Arnstein antes 1194. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu após 1194.

ru.Arnstein, Mansteld-Sudharz, Saxony-Anhal: арнстин, харкирод, мансфелдир ланд, сачсен-анэлт, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gertrud von Ballenstedt родилась около 1150 г. в местности ландкрис балленстедт, анэлт, Германия, её отцу по имени Graf Adalbert von Aschersleben "von Ballensted" было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Adelheid von Wettin, 12. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Graf Walther von Arnstein перед 1194 г. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла после 1194 г.
